overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path at night. The character passes ancient stone ruins and continues through a dark pine forest illuminated by moonlight and the character's sword glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with ancient stone ruins

events.description: character walks past the initial stone pillar and wall, transitioning to more open forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path, moving away from stone ruins with sword glowing on his back

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone structure beside the path
low stone wall running alongside the dirt path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
tall evergreen trees surrounding the trail
tall evergreen trees surrounding the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking past ancient stone ruins including a tall pillar and low wall on the right side. The path is a narrow dirt trail surrounded by pine trees under a clear night sky, with the character's sword emitting a faint glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with scattered ruins

events.description: stone wall ruins appear on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the forest path, approaching and passing ancient stone wall remnants

entered.detail: crumbling ancient stone wall section beside the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through a more open forest section, the path continues under moonlight. Around the 18-second mark, crumbling stone wall ruins appear on the right before being passed, leaving the trail surrounded by dense pine trees.

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating the winding dirt path through increasingly dense forest with trees closing in on both sides

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through deep forest as the stone ruins disappear behind. The pine trees draw closer to the path creating a more enclosed feeling, with the trail winding through dense vegetation under the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit forest trail that transitions from open ancient ruins into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with Geralt walking past a tall stone pillar and low walls on the right, his sword emitting a faint glow against the dark dirt path. As the camera moves forward, the ruins become more fragmented and crumbling before eventually falling away, leaving the trail surrounded by moonlight and pine trees. The scene then shifts as the forest thickens, with the pine trees drawing closer to the path and creating a more claustrophobic atmosphere. Finally, the trail winds deeper into the dark night sky, disappearing into a landscape of dense vegetation and towering trees.
